claude-code.description: Model ids accepted by Anthropic's Claude Code CLI on the Anthropic API (the --model flag / settings). Source: Claude Code model configuration docs plus Anthropic's current and legacy Claude model overview; provider-specific Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry ids are intentionally excluded.

codex.description: User-selectable model ids accepted by OpenAI's Codex CLI via the ChatGPT OAuth path. The CLI fetches its model catalog from chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex, which is a separate endpoint from the general OpenAI API. Source: codex-rs/models-manager/models.json in the openai/codex repo; internal-only codex-auto-review is intentionally omitted.

antigravity.description: Model ids accepted by Google's Antigravity CLI (command: agy). Supports multi-provider models. Source: antigravity.google official site/docs bundle; only models with catalog pricing/context data are included.

google-flow.description: Model ids represented by Google Flow's web-based AI filmmaking and image-generation client. Includes the Nano Banana image family (legacy, current, Pro, and Lite) and the Veo 3.1 and Gemini Omni Flash video families. Availability varies by region, Google AI subscription tier, and staged rollout; this is not the complete Gemini API or Vertex AI catalog. Source: Google Flow and Gemini API documentation. Imagen models are intentionally excluded because Google has announced their shutdown on 2026-08-17.
